raw_consumer_statement:
On or around XXXX XXXX I tried to use my Citi card for an online car rental reservation which led to a Fraud Alert call. Apparently the card was being flagged as it was being added to an XXXX XXXX, something I had not tried to do. As a result that card was cancelled and a new one was issued per the representative I spoke with. I left out of the country on the XXXX and returned home Sunday XXXX XXXX. 

On the XXXX I received a fraud alert call which led us to learn that my replacement card I never received was being used. I dedicated XXXX hours between XXXX and XXXX that night to assist with marking all the charges as fraudulent and to ensure the card was cancelled. Due to the amount of time spent on the call I was informed I would have a new card delivered to my home via FedEx as well as a gift card of {$100.00} for my time. 

Yesterday, XXXX XXXX, I receive another call at XXXX from a " supervisor '' advising that apart from the transactions addressed the evening before, there was also balance transfers attempted and also needed to be marked as fraudulent. I provided all the required authorization and the representative claimed he would take care of it and reach out in case of any further questions. This after receiving poor treatment from the representative ( recorded call - pull tapes if desired ). 

Today is the XXXX and received yet another call to learn that the card that was flagged as fraudelent 2 days ago remains active and that new charges were made using that card. This makes me wonder the integrity in which my account is being handled by Citi seeing as the card should have been cancelled the moment I confirmed the first fraudulent card. When asked today where to send the replacement card, I also raised the flag with them considering the " replacement '' was meant to be on its way 2 days ago and wonder now if/when I might receive that one. As a result, I opted out on having them send a replacement card today and went ahead and requested my account be permanently closed since I can not trust Citi is a right fit for my financial needs due to their mishandling of my case as well as mishandling my time which is of more value.
